output.context: CSS-only refactoring verified. The .modal-close-btn styles were successfully moved from resources/css/screen/swiper.css to blocks/TestimonialsCarousel/TestimonialsCarousel.css and converted from @apply Tailwind directives to plain CSS with CSS custom properties. The DynamicContentCarousel hover zoom rules were also successfully moved to blocks/DynamicContentCarousel/DynamicContentCarousel.css. No PHP/TSX/JS changes were made. The @keyframes carousel-nav-gradient-sweep remains in swiper.css (global scope) and is correctly referenced from the block CSS file. Both files include prefers-reduced-motion handling.
